name: Stench

name: Water Absorb

name: Immunity

name: Levitate

description: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.

name: Natural Cure

name: Illuminate

name: Poison Point
description: Has a 30% chance of poisoning attacking Pokémon on contact.

name: Magma Armor

name: Water Veil
description: Prevents burns.

name: Rain Dish

name: Keen Eye

name: Hyper Cutter

name: Swarm

name: Vital Spirit
description: Prevents sleep.

description: Prevents stats from being lowered by other Pokémon.

description: Doubles Attack in battle.

description: Protects against critical hits.

name: Heatproof

name: Dry Skin

name: Iron Fist

name: Poison Heal

name: Hydration

name: Aftermath

name: Tinted Lens

description: Decreases damage taken from super-effective moves by 1/4.

description: Summons hail that lasts indefinitely upon entering battle.

name: Telepathy

name: Moody

name: Sand Force

name: Iron Barbs

description: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent moves.

description: Bypasses targets' abilities if they could hinder or prevent moves.

name: Dazzling

description: When an ally faints, this Pokémon gains its Ability.

name: Propeller Tail
description: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.

name: Mirror Armor

name: Stalwart
description: Ignores moves and abilities that draw in moves.

name: Ripen

name: Mimicry

name: Screen Cleaner

name: Steely Spirit

name: Pastel Veil

description: Enables the Pokémon to move first occasionally.

name: Unseen Fist

name: Curious Medicine

name: Transistor

name: Dragon’s Maw
description: Powers up Dragon-type moves.

name: Chilling Neigh

name: Grim Neigh

name: As One
description: This Ability combines the effects of both Calyrex’s Unnerve Ability and Glastrier’s Chilling Neigh Ability.

name: As One
description: This Ability combines the effects of both Calyrex’s Unnerve Ability and Spectrier’s Grim Neigh Ability.

name: Lingering Aroma

name: Seed Sower

name: Thermal Exchange
description: Raises Attack when hit by a Fire-type move. Cannot be burned.

name: Well-Baked Body

name: Quark Drive

name: Good as Gold

name: Vessel of Ruin

name: Sword of Ruin

name: Beads of Ruin

name: Cud Chew

name: Sharpness

name: Supreme Overlord

name: Costar

name: Armor Tail

name: Earth Eater

name: Mycelium Might

name: Mind’s Eye
description: The Pokémon ignores changes to opponents' evasiveness, its accuracy can't be lowered, and it can hit Ghost types with Normal- and Fighting-type moves.

name: Supersweet Syrup
description: Once per battle, when a Pokémon with Supersweet Syrup enters the battle, it lowers the evasion stat of all adjacent opponents by one stage.

name: Hospitality

name: Toxic Chain

name: Tera Shell

name: Teraform Zero

name: Poison Puppeteer

name: Piercing Drill

name: Dragonize

name: Mega Sol

name: Spicy Spray

name: Eelevate

name: Fire Mane
